findings.finding: fetchFiatPrices uses fully-qualified CoinGeckoApi type instead of import
findings.suggestion: Add import for com.mcw.core.network.api.CoinGeckoApi and use short name
findings.rationale: Code style consistency — all other types use short names via imports

findings.finding: @Suppress(UNUSED_PARAMETER) on buildTransaction for chainId is correct but could be cleaner
findings.suggestion: Consider documenting in the KDoc that chainId is intentionally unused here and applied during signTransaction
findings.rationale: Already has a comment in the annotation, acceptable as-is

findings.finding: In fetchBalance, constructing weiHex via string concatenation is slightly redundant — could use BigDecimal(response.balance) directly
findings.suggestion: Replace intermediate hex conversion with BigDecimal(response.balance) / WEI_PER_ETH
findings.rationale: Simpler code path, avoids unnecessary hex encoding/decoding cycle

findings.finding: EvmManager has no @Inject constructor, making it harder to use with Hilt DI
findings.suggestion: Add @Inject constructor() for Hilt integration (build.gradle.kts already includes Hilt)
findings.rationale: The DI module will need to provide this. Adding @Inject now saves work in the app module task

summary: Clean implementation following established patterns. All task requirements met. Pure functions in companion object enable easy testing. Coroutine usage is correct. Minor suggestions for DI readiness and code style.
